exercises.title: Rejection Sampling Analysis
exercises.description: Analyze why rejection sampling is critical for ML-DSA security.
hints: Without rejection, signatures leak secret key bits

exercises.title: Certificate Size Impact
exercises.description: Calculate the impact of ML-DSA on X.509 certificate chains.
hints: Include both public key and signature in certificates

exercises.title: Variant Selection Guide
exercises.description: Create a decision guide for selecting ML-DSA variants.
hints: Consider signature size vs security tradeoffs

exercises.title: Implementation Checklist
exercises.description: Create a security checklist for ML-DSA implementation.
